ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "precipitation_attributes" TEXT /* Attributes of the precipitation data (e.g., quality control flags) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "temperature_attributes" TEXT /* Attributes of the temperature data (e.g., quality control flags) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hectopascals */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "quality_check" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data has passed quality checks */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "precipitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., mm, inches) */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the precipitation data */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the precipitation */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the precipitation event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precipitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "value" REAL /* Temperature value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., C, F) */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the temperature data */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature */,
  "heat_index" REAL /* Heat index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_data" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., m/s, km/h) */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the wind data */,
  "gust_speed" REAL /* Speed of wind gusts */,
  "gust_direction" TEXT /* Direction of wind gusts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_data" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "value" REAL /* Humidity value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., %) */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the humidity data */,
  "dew_point_temperature" REAL /* Dew point temperature */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_data" (
  "pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "value" REAL /* Pressure value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., hPa, atm) */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the pressure data */,
  "pressure_tendency" TEXT /* Tendency of pressure change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "readme_contents" TEXT /* Brief description of the contents of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert */,
  "alert_sent_to" TEXT /* List of users or groups the alert was sent to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
